characters.name: 'tude Guard
characters.description: 'tude GuardCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthProfessionSecurity guardBackground InformationFirst appearance"Jurassic Bark"Voiced byJohn DiMaggio 'tude Guardis a security guard who works at the Museum of Natural History inNew New York City. He has a major attitude and told offMorrisandMundafor being above the surface, even though they had surface passes. (Sewer mutants cannot go up to the surface unless they have passes from the mayor.) He also kickedFryout of the museum for stealing the fossil of his20th century dog.

147573952589676412927Character InformationGenderStatusSpeciesRobotPlanetChapek 9Background InformationFirst appearance"Fear of a Bot Planet" 147573952589676412927is aRobotrecipient of a package delivered byBender Bending Rodríguezto thePlanetChapek 9, the robot separatist home planet in "Free Will Hunting". As humans are hunted as a xenophobic past time on Chapek 9, only Bender can make the delivery whilePhilip J. Fry IandTuranga Leelastay on board thePlanet Expressshipin orbit. When making the delivery, Bender is sprayed in the face with nerve gas through the peephole of 147573952589676412927's door as a measure to prove he isn't aHuman. 147573952589676412927 may or may not be the robot who discovered Fry urinating behind a trash bin and offered to seal his coolant leak with hot resin when Leela, Fry and Bender made their first visit to Chapek 9. His appearance and voice were the same as that unit, but a robot's appearance and voice are not necessarily unique.

characters.name: 20th century child
characters.description: 20th century childCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthBackground InformationFirst appearance"Space Pilot 3000"Voiced byKath Soucie The20th century childwas an unnamedhumanboy who regularly visitedPanucci's Pizzaand enjoyed playing on theMonkey Fracas Jr.machine and eating pizza slices during the 20th century. He watchedPhilip J. Fryplay poorly on New Year's Eve 1999.

characters.name: 20th Century Lecturer
characters.description: 20th Century LecturerCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthMarsProfessionProfessor atMars UniversityBackground InformationFirst appearance"Mars University"Voiced byBilly West The20th Century Lectureris a professor of 20th century studies atMars University. He teaches a class that containsPhilip J. Fry,Amy Wong, andGuenter, assuring them that the only way to get an A is to have actually lived in the 20th century. He does not hesitate to electrocute students when they say or do something wrong. The character appears to owe something to Professor Charles W. Kingsfield, Jr., John Houseman's character inThe Paper Chase, set in Harvard, the Mars University ofEarth.

characters.name: 20th Century Lecturer

characters.name: 21st Century Woman
characters.description: 21st Century WomanCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthBackground InformationFirst appearance"Love's Labours Lost in Space"Voiced byLauren Tom The21st Century Womanwas a woman from the 21st century who had herself frozen sometime after all the cyborgs enslaved humanity, only to be unfrozen in the 31st century. She metFryatThe Hip Jointand the two bonded over being frozen for centuries. However, because of their different eras, Fry was unaware of some the things she experienced but was able to go along with it. They dated briefly, with Fry telling Bender he was having company at the apartment and paying him to keep away for the night.

characters.name: 7¹¹ Clerk
characters.description: 7¹¹ ClerkCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthProfessionClerk at7¹¹Background InformationFirst appearance"War is the H-Word"Voiced byTress MacNeille The7¹¹ Clerkis the only known man clerk at the chain store7¹¹. He is keen to follow the company's policy yet seems to dislike most customers. He is completely enclosed in either glass or plastic to protect himself from customers.

characters.name: 7¹¹ robot
characters.description: 7¹¹ robotCharacter InformationGenderStatusAliveSpeciesRobotPlanetEarthProfessionActor7¹¹ robotBackground InformationFirst appearance"Bender Should Not Be Allowed on Television" –Turanga LeelainBender Should Not Be Allowed on Television The7¹¹ robotis a childrobotactor who "grew up and became a convenience store". It is a vending machine that sells7¹¹products. He was at the auditions ofAntonio Calculon, Jr.'s role in the robot television show "All My Circuits" which became vacant after he broke down during an episode, but wasn't able to get the part. He also sells lottery tickets.

characters.name: Ab-Bot
characters.description: Ab-BotCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesRobotPlanetChapek 9ProfessionAbbotBackground InformationFirst appearance"Free Will Hunting"Voiced byMaurice LaMarche Ab-Botis the head of the robot monastary thatBenderbriefly joined onChapek 9during his quest to deal with the fact that he has no self determination. The robots of this "monk outfit" take solace in the fact that though they are mere automatons, they are "magnificent automatons".

characters.name: Abner Doubledeal
characters.description: Abner DoubledealAbner (middle) talking to Leela.Character InformationGenderStatusAgeLate 30s/mid to late 40sSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthProfessionOwner:Ultimate Robot Fighting League,New New York Mets, the Tickleodeon TV network, and the Butterfly DerbyRelativesSally(Adoptive Daughter)Albert(Adoptive Son)Nina(Adopted Daughter)(Various unnamed orphans)Background InformationFirst appearance"Raging Bender"Voiced byTom Kenny Abner Doubledealis the sleazy owner of at least two sports organizations in the show. He owned theUltimate Robot Fighting League[1]and a year later he sold the URFL and bought theNew New York Mets[2]. He also is the commissioner and acts as the announcer for the Butterfly Derby held at the Moon. Doubledeal is a stereotypical businessman. He often finds the person or trend that will appear to become a large success and will quickly move in to make a deal on it. While he usually appears to make fair deals for both sides, he still tries to work things to his favor.

She was cursed to run down her best friend from aromatherapy class. The curse was lifted whenBenderhunted downProject Satan, the original were-car.

characters.name: Abraham Lincolnbot
characters.description: Abraham LincolnbotCharacter InformationGenderSpeciesRobotPlanetEarthProfessionPatient in Hal InstituteAbraham Lincoln impersonatorBackground InformationFirst appearance"Insane in the Mainframe"Voiced byDavid Herman –Abraham Lincolnbot inInsane in the Mainframe TheAbraham Lincolnbotis a minor robot character, presumably created to impersonate the formerPresident of the United StatesAbraham Lincoln. He was in theHal Institute for Criminally Insane Robots. There is also apparently a "Robot Lincoln" which ended Robot slavery which is entirely different from this Abraham Lincoln.

characters.name: Adlai Atkins
characters.description: Adlai AtkinsCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthProfessionPhaser eye surgeonBackground InformationFirst appearanceThe Cyber House RulesVoiced byTom Kenny Adlai as a child Adlai Atkins, also known asDr. Atkins, is a former orphan who grew up withTuranga LeelaatCookieville Minimum-Security Orphanarium. He became an eye phaser surgeon and started dating Leela after he performed a surgery to give her two eyes. He likes everything plain and normal. When Adlai and Leela decided to adopt a child, Leela picked a girl with an ear on her forehead. (Sally) Adlai wanted to perform a surgery on her: this reminded Leela that she liked herself as she was without the operation and she dumped Adlai then had the surgery redone, much toPhilip J. Fry's delight. WhenBender Bending Rodríguezfires the Planetary Annihilator in a duel withCalculoninThe Beast with a Billion Backs, Adlai could be seen inspecting a patient's pimple for pimple removal. The patient was subsequently annihilated, leaving only the pimple. Adlai and Leela made Fry unhappy over a date and Leela's eyeball turned into two. But Adlai and Fry were in common.

characters.name: Admiral Chu
characters.description: Admiral ChuCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesCarcaronProfessionLeader of theCarcaronsBackground InformationFirst appearance"Zapp Dingbat"Voiced byMaurice LaMarche Admiral Chuis the leader of theCarcaronmilitary forces. During negotiations withZapp Brannigan, he was insulted by Brannigan's bumbling attempt to compliment him in his native tongue (instead Brannigan intimates that he'd like to spank Chu's sister with a slice of bologna). Mundasmooths the situation over using her exolingustic skills, but Brannigan later attempts to trick the Carcarons into attacking theNimbusduring his wedding to the newly divorced Munda. When it becomes clear that the Nimbus is outgunned, Munda forces Zapp's hand by making him correctly speak the one Carcaron word that will bring peace. Chu is equally nonchalant at accepting the peace and accepting fishing rights in Super-Nova Scotia.

His brain was once put in the body of agreat white sharkby ProfessorHubert J. Farnsworthin favour of scientific advances. Adolf Hitler (center) inThe Scary Door

characters.name: Al Gore's Head
characters.description: Al Gore's HeadCharacter InformationGenderStatusAge1,052SpeciesFormerly:HumanCurrently:Heads in JarsPlanetEarthProfessionFormerly:Vice President of the United StatesCurrently:Emperor of theMoonBackground InformationFirst appearance"Put Your Head on My Shoulders"Voiced byHimself –Al Gore,Anthology of Interest I Albert Arnold"Al"Gore, Jr.(born March 31, 1948) is the first Emperor of theMoonand rode "the mighty moon worm". He sported an almost excessively elaborate jar; not only was the base colored silver-white, but it possessed several hologram projectors, two small rockets for mobility, a pair of lasers, and was backed with the top of a cape. Gore was the author of the book Earth in the Balance and the much more popular Harry Potter and the Balance of Earth, in which he explained that the environment must be protected from global warming and dark wizards.

Gore was the author of the book Earth in the Balance and the much more popular Harry Potter and the Balance of Earth, in which he explained that the environment must be protected from global warming and dark wizards.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertCharacter InformationGenderStatusSpeciesHumanPlanetEarthProfessionOrphanRelativesAdoptive father(s):Bender Bending RodríguezandAbner DoubledealAdoptive sister(s):SallyandNinaUnknown:Various adoptive siblingsBackground InformationFirst appearance"The Cyber House Rules"Voiced byKath Soucie Albertis an orphan at theCookieville Minimum-Security Orphanarium. He is one of the orphansBenderadopted for a short time in the episodeThe Cyber House Rules. He is then returned to the Orphanarium along with all of the other orphans adopted by Bender. Later, in the episode "Yo Leela Leela", he is part of the group of orphans who are adopted byAbner Doubledealand theTickleodeoncorporation to run the reality television show of theHumplings.
